seo.meta_description: Secure payment options for your Mount Rinjani trek — bank transfer, Wise, Revolut, and PayPal. Pay safely with Go2Rinjani.

title: Payment Information
subtitle: Here are the available payment methods you can use to send your payment safely.

help.title: Need Help?
help.desc: Our team is always ready to assist you.

tabletSub: Choose your preferred method — all payments are securely processed.

bankTransfer.desc: Transfer directly from your bank account
bankTransfer.notice: Please include your <1>invoice number</1> in the payment reference.

revolut.notice: Use same bank details as Bank Transfer.

paypal.fee: 4.5% PayPal fee will be borne by the user
paypal.invoiceInfo: We will create an invoice for you
paypal.sendEmail: Invoice will be sent via email

mobileSecure: All payments are processed with bank-level encryption
footerNote: Once your payment has been sent, please share the payment proof with us for faster confirmation.
